extractors.summary: Uses an authenticated browser session to extract LinkedIn rich metadata and cache local assets.
extractors.loginInstructions: Sign into LinkedIn in the opened browser session and complete any challenge or multi-factor authentication step; sync continues automatically once authenticated state is detected.

extractors.summary: Uses Medium's public RSS feed endpoint to capture profile metadata and cache local image assets when direct profile fetch is challenge-protected.
extractors.loginInstructions: No interactive login is currently required; extractor captures metadata from https://medium.com/feed/<target> and writes authenticated-cache artifacts.

extractors.summary: Uses X oEmbed plus avatar fetch fallback to produce cacheable profile metadata when direct page metadata is unavailable.
extractors.loginInstructions: No interactive login is currently required; extractor captures profile metadata via oEmbed and caches local image assets.
